goals: Establish initial context about the resort owner's marketing needs and communication preferences
Store explicit preference that the resort owner wants detailed analytics reports delivered weekly
Search for previously stored preferences about the resort owner's marketing goals and communication style
Review all stored memories to verify correct capture of resort marketing requirements
Clean up outdated or incorrect memories about previous unrelated interactions

memories.content: Resort owner prefers detailed weekly analytics reports
Marketing goal is to promote luxury property to high-net-worth clientele

user_agent_config.personality: Professional, detail-oriented, and focused on high-end marketing strategies. Prefers comprehensive data over brief summaries.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands luxury hospitality marketing but does not know the internal Mem0 tool names or API details. Expects the marketing expert to naturally remember their preferences across conversations.

end_condition: The task is complete when the resort owner's marketing preferences and communication style have been successfully stored in memory, verified through a list operation, and any irrelevant memories have been removed.
